trust_band.reason: BALL track source is wasb; the M1 gate (F1@20>=0.90, recall@20>=0.75, hidden-FP<=0.05) has not passed for any milestone (0/8 per MASTER_PLAN.md); treat ball position as a rough cue, not a verified track.

Placement uses the metric-15pt reviewed calibration (source=metric_15pt_reviewed, intrinsics.source=metric_15pt_reviewed, grade=warn, metric_confidence=low, reasons=reprojection_high, single_view_planar_full_calibration, distortion_model=zero_distortion_grid_search_focal, reviewed_15pt_correspondences). The held-out PCK@5px>=0.95 CAL gate has not passed, and the single-view planar calibration still carries the documented metric-scale identifiability caveats; treat court_Z0 meter placement as preview, not verified.
